rules.condition: Name or object, process information, modelling information, exchanges, or version identity is absent.
rules.decision: Record which core audit dimensions cannot be completed.
rules.suggestion: Provide the missing core window or field before requesting a full audit.
exceptions: The user explicitly requests a partial audit.

rules.condition: Name, route, general comment, technical description, intended use, and core output do not describe the same process object.
evidence_required: at least two conflicting object descriptions
rules.decision: Treat a verified object mismatch as blocking.
rules.suggestion: Revise the name, description, or core output so all locations describe the same process object.
exceptions: The dataset explicitly documents a multi-process or aggregated boundary.

rules.condition: The selected dataset type appears inconsistent with the documented process boundary or level of aggregation.
rules.decision: Treat as blocking when the mismatch is clear enough to change whether the dataset is interpreted as a single operation, black-box unit process, partly terminated system, or aggregated LCI result.
rules.suggestion: Select the dataset type that matches the documented boundary, or explicitly explain the single-operation, black-box, partly terminated, or aggregated role.
exceptions: Multiple internal steps are intentionally represented as one documented black-box process.

sections: 具体要求：生命周期清单数据集

rules.condition: The dataset type is Partly terminated system, but the dataset does not identify which upstream or background processes have been terminated and which inputs still call background processes.
rules.decision: Do not accept Partly terminated system solely as a label; require enough evidence to distinguish it from a black-box unit process or LCI result.
rules.suggestion: Explain the terminated upstream or background processes and the inputs that still rely on background data, or change the type to the matching unit-process or LCI-result type.
exceptions: The dataset explicitly documents the partly terminated boundary and remaining linked inputs.
The audit input is partial and does not include modelling information.

sections: 与部分分解数据集相关的补充信息合规要求

rules.condition: LCI method fields conflict with the selected dataset type or the documented modelling method.
rules.decision: Empty, '-', or not-applicable values are acceptable for single-operation and black-box unit processes unless other evidence conflicts.
rules.suggestion: Align the LCI method fields with the selected dataset type and documented modelling method.
exceptions: Single-operation or black-box unit process with empty, '-', or not-applicable LCI method fields.

rules.condition: A lifecycle boundary statement such as cradle-to-gate is used while another visible field explicitly excludes a stage normally covered by that boundary, such as collection or transport, without explaining the narrower boundary.
rules.decision: Treat an unexplained contradiction between lifecycle boundary wording and excluded activities as blocking.
rules.suggestion: Rewrite the boundary as the actual included foreground stages and separately list excluded collection, transport, use, or end-of-life activities.
exceptions: The dataset explicitly defines a non-standard cradle-to-gate convention and lists the excluded activities.

sections: 数据截断和完整性原则
偏离数据截断和完整性原则/解释

rules.condition: The dataset describes a lifecycle or plant boundary but does not document excluded activities, cross-boundary flows, or quantitative cut-off criteria well enough to reproduce the boundary.
rules.decision: Record a manual review item or escalate to blocking when the missing boundary detail changes how the dataset can be used.
rules.suggestion: State the included processes, excluded activities, cross-boundary flows, and quantitative cut-off or coverage criterion.
exceptions: A narrow foreground unit process with all key exclusions already visible in the inventory.

rules.condition: The data cut-off and completeness principles field is empty or only contains a placeholder such as '-'.
rules.decision: Create an audit finding when the placeholder prevents reviewers from understanding quantitative cut-off, coverage, exclusions, or cross-boundary flows; do not treat the placeholder as a structural error only.
rules.suggestion: Fill in the cut-off and completeness principles, including quantitative cut-off criteria, coverage, exclusions, and cross-boundary flows where applicable.
exceptions: A narrow foreground process documents all exclusions and explains why no quantitative cut-off applies.

sections: 数据截断和完整性原则
偏离数据截断和完整性原则/解释

rules.condition: The functional unit or reference-flow statement conflicts with the core output quantity, unit, or referenced exchange.
rules.decision: Treat an unexplained quantity, unit, or reference mismatch as blocking.
rules.suggestion: Use one reference quantity and unit across the description, reference flow, and all exchanges.
exceptions: A valid conversion or scaling relationship is explicitly documented.

sections: 功能、功能单位和基准流

rules.condition: Annual supply, production volume, or reference-flow text provides a quantity without an explicit unit or without explaining how it relates to the reference flow.
rules.decision: Treat as advisory unless the missing unit creates a quantity conflict.
rules.suggestion: Write the annual supply or production volume with quantity, unit, product name, location, and its relationship to the dataset reference flow.
exceptions: The same field already includes an unambiguous unit and product reference.

sections: 功能、功能单位和基准流

rules.condition: The description explicitly includes or excludes a material, energy, emission, transport, or life-cycle stage, but the exchanges show the opposite without explanation.
rules.decision: Treat the verified contradiction as blocking.
rules.suggestion: Correct the boundary statement or exchanges and explain any intentional exclusion.
exceptions: The apparent difference is explained by aggregation, cut-off, or an internal flow.

rules.condition: A key raw material, energy input, product, waste, or emission explicitly required by the described process is absent without explanation.
rules.decision: Treat as blocking when the missing flow materially affects understanding or use of the dataset.
rules.suggestion: Add the missing key flow or explain why it is excluded from the dataset boundary.
exceptions: The flow is below a documented cut-off or represented by an aggregated exchange.

rules.condition: Exchange quantities show an obvious order-of-magnitude, scaling, or physical plausibility problem.
rules.decision: Treat clear unexplained scaling or conservation failures as blocking.
rules.suggestion: Recalculate all exchanges against the confirmed reference quantity and document any justified imbalance.
exceptions: Mass conversion, water addition, reaction products, emissions, or other balance terms explain the difference.

rules.condition: The dataset uses waste, scrap, recycled, reused, or recovered material as a key input, but the burden treatment for collection, sorting, preprocessing, avoided burden, or cut-off/recycled-content modelling is not explained.
evidence_required: recycling or waste burden modelling statement
rules.decision: Treat as blocking when users cannot determine whether upstream primary production, collection, sorting, or preprocessing burdens are included.
rules.suggestion: State the recycling modelling approach and whether waste collection, sorting, preprocessing, transport, and upstream primary-material burdens are included or cut off.
exceptions: The dataset is only a foreground gate-to-gate process and explicitly states which secondary-material burdens are outside the boundary.

sections: 在重复使用/回收/恢复中替代多功能过程和系统
废物和产品报废阶段处理模型

rules.condition: Multiple valuable outputs exist but their roles, allocation, system expansion, or unallocated joint-process status are not explained.
rules.decision: Treat as blocking when the ambiguity changes how the target product result should be interpreted.
rules.suggestion: State whether the dataset is an unallocated joint process or document how burdens are assigned to the target product.
exceptions: Additional outputs are clearly internal loops, wastes, or negligible by-products.

sections: 过程和系统的多功能性
解决归因模型中多功能问题

rules.condition: The dataset mentions allocation, shared flows, co-products, or a multi-product source study, but does not state the allocation basis, allocated flows, target product quantity, and treatment of product-specific flows.
rules.decision: Treat as blocking when the target product inventory cannot be traced from the stated allocation approach.
rules.suggestion: State which flows are product-specific, which flows are shared, the allocation basis such as mass or economic value, and the reference quantity for the target product.
exceptions: The dataset is intentionally unallocated and clearly labelled as a joint-process unit process.

sections: 细分或虚拟细分以避免分配

rules.condition: A flow name, type, classification, direction, or reference unit is clearly incompatible with the represented material or role.
evidence_required: searched classification candidates when the issue involves classification
rules.decision: Treat as blocking when the mismatch affects calculation, connection, search, or emission destination; otherwise advisory.
rules.suggestion: Choose or create a flow whose name, type, classification, direction, and reference unit match its actual role; when the issue involves classification, include candidate classification paths or candidate ranges and the condition for choosing among them.
exceptions: The platform offers no exact category and the selected near-match is reasonable.

rules.condition: An input exchange is an elementary or resource flow, but the process context describes the same material as a purchased input, raw material, auxiliary material, or consumable.
evidence_required: process context describing purchased or input role
rules.decision: Treat as blocking when visible context clearly shows the exchange is a purchased technosphere input; otherwise mark for manual confirmation and allow an environmental exchange explanation.
rules.suggestion: Use a product flow for purchased material inputs, or explain why the exchange is intentionally modelled as an environmental resource flow.
exceptions: The context explicitly describes the exchange as an environmental flow such as uptake from air, water, or ground.

rules.condition: An exchange references a flow dataset UUID or persistent identity, but the flow dataset version is absent.
rules.decision: Record a traceability gap because the exact flow dataset cannot be distinguished from other versions.
rules.suggestion: Provide the referenced flow dataset version, or re-export the exchange with complete flow identity metadata.
exceptions: The source system does not expose flow versions and the audit scope is limited to visible page fields.

rules.condition: A flow's physical form in the name or description, such as liquefied, gaseous, solution, wet, or dry, is incompatible with the reference property or exchange unit without a documented conversion.
evidence_required: conversion or form explanation if any
rules.decision: Treat as blocking when the mismatch can change inventory amounts, background-flow selection, or unit conversion.
rules.suggestion: Select a flow whose physical form matches the measured unit, or document the conversion between mass, volume, concentration, or physical state.
exceptions: The field explicitly states the measured state and conversion factor.

rules.condition: The dataset includes material water input, wastewater indicators, or water-body emissions, but the boundary does not explain water use, recycling, evaporation, sludge moisture, or internal/external wastewater treatment.
rules.decision: Treat as blocking when water-related emissions or waste treatment cannot be interpreted inside or outside the process boundary; otherwise record a manual review item.
rules.suggestion: Explain the water balance and wastewater treatment boundary, including recycled water, losses, evaporation, sludge moisture, and whether treatment is internal or external.
exceptions: Water is a minor ancillary input with no water emissions or treatment claims.

rules.condition: A flow is marked unreviewed but no content error is visible.
rules.decision: Do not create an audit finding solely from unreviewed status.
rules.suggestion: No change is required unless the flow content itself is incorrect.

rules.condition: The classification path is broadly related but less specific than the product and process described by the dataset.
rules.decision: Do not reject solely because a more specific classification may exist; raise advisory guidance when a better candidate is supported by taxonomy search.
rules.suggestion: Use the closest available classification for the product and process, include candidate classification paths or candidate ranges, and document the process attribute when no exact path exists.
exceptions: The current path is the best available taxonomy match or the taxonomy has no closer category.

rules.condition: Key data, parameters, or calculation logic cannot be traced sufficiently to assess the dataset.
rules.decision: Treat as blocking when lack of traceability prevents verification; otherwise advisory.
rules.suggestion: Identify the source and explain the treatment or calculation of the key data.
exceptions: A cited source or processing report already provides adequate traceability.
Calculated status alone is not an error.

sections: 所需数据和信息类型/质量/来源
数据集 LCA 报告，背景信息

rules.condition: The dataset cites a source needed to verify key boundary, technology, geography, year, inventory, or treatment claims, but the source document cannot be downloaded, opened, or extracted.
rules.decision: Record an information gap when unavailable source evidence prevents a core check; do not state the dataset field is wrong solely because the source is unavailable.
rules.suggestion: Provide an accessible source document or extract, or explain the data treatment and affected field directly in the dataset.
exceptions: The cited source is not needed for the current audit scope.
Equivalent source evidence is available elsewhere in the case record.

sections: 所需数据和信息类型/质量/来源

rules.condition: A source document directly contradicts a dataset field such as boundary, reference year, geography, technology route, key parameter, or included/excluded activity.
rules.decision: Treat as blocking when the conflict changes the interpretation, representativeness, or reusable scope of the dataset.
rules.suggestion: Align the dataset field with the source evidence, or document how the source value was adjusted for this dataset.
exceptions: The dataset explicitly explains a justified adjustment from the source.
The source excerpt is background context rather than the data used for the current dataset.

rules.condition: A source document is available, but the audit cannot find support for a key dataset claim that depends on that source.
rules.decision: Record manual review or information gap depending on whether the missing support affects a core audit dimension; do not automatically mark the field as false.
rules.suggestion: Point to the page or section supporting the claim, add the data treatment explanation, or revise the field to match the documented source scope.
exceptions: The source is only one of multiple inputs and another source supports the field.
The checked extraction is incomplete or OCR quality is insufficient.

sections: 所需数据和信息类型/质量/来源

rules.condition: General comments or technical descriptions present source-study project background, LCIA results, benchmark shares, or background parameters without distinguishing them from the current dataset's actual modelling content.
evidence_required: source-derived statement in a description field
current dataset boundary or modelling statement
rules.decision: Do not flag the use of cited literature itself. Treat the issue as blocking when the wording can cause source-study results or parameters to be interpreted as the current dataset's own results or modelling basis; otherwise advisory.
rules.suggestion: Delete or label the source-study content and rewrite the description around the current dataset's reference flow, boundary, exchanges, data treatment, and linked background processes.
exceptions: The source-derived content is clearly labelled and its relationship to the current dataset is explained.
The cited source content accurately describes the current dataset without creating ambiguity.

sections: 数据集 LCA 报告，背景信息

rules.condition: Reference year, geography, technology, source, and intended use do not appear mutually supportive.
rules.decision: Treat as blocking only when a clear contradiction materially affects applicability.
rules.suggestion: Align the representativeness description with the actual source, year, geography, and technology.
exceptions: The dataset explicitly explains why broader or proxy representation is appropriate.

rules.condition: The dataset lacks enough data-quality information to understand technical, geographical, temporal, precision, completeness, consistency, or total DQR evaluation.
rules.decision: Do not automatically reject a dataset solely for missing optional DQR fields; escalate when the missing DQR information prevents judging representativeness or reuse.
rules.suggestion: Document data quality using technical, geographical, temporal, precision, completeness, consistency, and total DQR information where applicable.
exceptions: The current platform configuration does not expose DQR fields and the audit scope is content-only.

rules.condition: Goal and scope metadata such as intended application, limitations, audience, comparative-use statement, or commissioner is missing or too vague for reuse.
rules.decision: Treat as advisory unless the absence prevents understanding the dataset's valid use.
rules.suggestion: Complete the intended application, limitations, audience or comparative-use statement, and commissioner/owner information needed for traceability.
exceptions: The audit task is limited to inventory content and the missing field is not required by the platform.

rules.condition: Review, background report, data generator, modeler, or documentor information is missing or not linked well enough for audit traceability.
rules.decision: Treat as advisory unless the missing traceability blocks verification of key data or review status.
rules.suggestion: Link the background report or review report and identify the data generator, modeler, or documentor when the platform exposes those fields.
exceptions: Equivalent source and owner information already provides traceability.
The platform does not expose a dedicated modeler field.

sections: 数据集 LCA 报告，背景信息

rules.condition: Version, format, owner or commissioner, data entry identity, or persistent identifier required for publication cannot be identified.
rules.decision: Record an information gap for publication readiness; do not mechanically flag optional workflow fields.
rules.suggestion: Complete the minimum identity and version information needed to trace and publish the dataset.
exceptions: The current task is a content-only preliminary audit.
